case_title: WARRINGTON, JOHNSON N VS CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WARRINGTON, JOHNSON N IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY WARRINGTON, JOHNSON N AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-04-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WARRINGTON, JOHNSON N RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $35.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,035.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER HEARING SET FOR DEC-16-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF DEC-16-1993, GRANTED
